name: Lucky Film Company,Limited
summary: Lucky Film Company,Limited manufactures and sells digital photo papers in China. It also offers printing photo papers, printing photographic papers, double-sided beauty DF-1 products, wing color SA-60 papers, and sanlay series products; new energy products; solar battery backplanes; new material products; transparent conductive films; and color paper wash kit, color film wash kit, radiographic film wash kit, black and white film/paper wash kit, and photo processing chemicals. In addition, the company provides inkjet printing papers, photo crystal glue, image materials, and photovoltaic materials; and emulsion preparation, color photo paper coating, color paper finishing packaging products, rinsing process kit, and optical film coating products. Lucky Film Company,Limited was founded in 1998 and is based in Baoding, China.
